name: spotto-help
description: User help documentation for Spotto mobile application

scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run check-links && npm run check-images
scripts.validate: echo 'Validating markdown files...' && node scripts/validate.js || echo 'Create scripts/validate.js to enable validation'
scripts.check-links: echo 'Checking links...' && node scripts/check-links.js || echo 'Create scripts/check-links.js to enable link checking'
scripts.lint-markdown: echo 'Linting markdown...' && markdownlint 'docs/**/*.md' '*.md' || echo 'Install markdownlint-cli: npm install markdownlint-cli'
scripts.check-images: echo 'Checking images...' && node scripts/check-images.js || echo 'Create scripts/check-images.js to enable image checking'
scripts.postinstall: echo '✅ Dependencies installed. Run npm test to validate content.'

author: Spotto Development Team
